stages.title: Encrypted Session
stages.subtitle: All traffic sealed with symmetric keys

explainers.body: A trusted Certificate Authority signs the server's identity so your browser can trust it.
Both sides agree on a shared secret without ever sending it across the wire.
Symmetric encryption makes data fast and private for the whole session.

quote_main: Modern TLS 1.3 cuts the handshake to 1 round trip — faster & safer.
quote_sub: Older TLS needed 2; every millisecond counts.
